positive: Minimalist celestial map abstract, showing constellations and nebula art in clean line work on a dark navy background. The main subject is a stylized, interconnected pattern of bright gold and iridescent blue lines representing stellar dust and mythological animal figures (like the Griffin, the Scorpion, and the Celestial Bear). The style must be elegant, high-contrast vector art with a glowing, ethereal ink effect. Composition must be centrally balanced and highly scalable for textile printing. Use negative space as a key design element. Cinematic, deep space, cosmic, geometric, symmetrical, highly detailed, vaporwave influences, octane render, 8k resolution, ultra-crisp lines.
